os_version: Windows Server 2022 (GCE flutter-gemma-gpu, us-central1-a, NVidia T4, embeddings ran on CPU)
note: N=1000 measured directly (median of 2 cached-bench runs from stdout transcript; tunnel rotated before JSON could be flushed). N=5000 APPROXIMATED — extrapolated from the measured N=1000 using the median 1k→5k ratio across macOS/Android/Linux/iOS (upsert pts/sec ÷6.07, latencies ×{p50:4.70, p95:6.60, p99:6.49}). The legacy backend's slowdown is dominated by sqlite I/O and local_hnsw rebuild cost — both backend-internal, so cross-platform ratios are a tight proxy.
